content.about: Conte srl opera nella zona industriale di Ceglie Messapica (BR) offrendo servizi di revisione, riparazione e diagnosi per veicoli industriali e autovetture. L'azienda utilizza prodotti e attrezzature all'avanguardia per garantire tutela e garanzie al cliente, con esperienza, precisione e celerita.

_notes: Site is a 2008-vintage Italian static HTML site (Last-Modified Feb 2008 on assets).

Industry classification is ambiguous: services map to 'automotive workshop / heavy vehicle repair' which is not in the allowed enum (tech / construction / restaurant / professional-services / other). Closest match is 'construction' due to industrial/heavy-equipment overlap, but confidence is low (0.55). Master agent should ask Denis which starter to use.

Only one image meets the >=400px width threshold (index1.jpg). All slideshow images are 325x244 and were downloaded for reference but flagged usable=false. Asset-gatherer will need to source heavy-vehicle-workshop stock images.
No team, testimonials, founding year, or social media on site.
Three published email addresses: info@conte-srl.com, conte.magazzino@libero.it, conte.contesrl@libero.it. Primary listed as info@.
